title: SFC reprimands and fines licensed corporation for AML control failures
body: The Securities and Futures Commission reprimanded a licensed corporation and imposed a fine after identifying anti-money laundering control deficiencies. The firm failed to perform sufficient customer due diligence and transaction monitoring for high-risk clients.

title: Circular to licensed corporations on market misconduct surveillance
body: The regulator reminded licensed corporations to maintain effective trading surveillance, escalation procedures, and evidence retention. Firms should review market conduct controls for suspicious order patterns and disclosure obligations.

title: Updated licensing guidance for responsible officers
body: The SFC published updated licensing guidance for responsible officers and representatives. The update clarifies competence requirements, sponsor responsibilities, and ongoing notification expectations.
